name: 3 Day Taman Safari Prigen, Bromo & Madakaripura from Surabaya
description: 3-day private tour from Surabaya: Taman Safari Prigen wildlife park (Day 1), Mount Bromo sunrise with private 4WD jeep (Day 2), and Madakaripura Waterfall canyon trek (Day 3) returning to Surabaya. No Ijen, no health screening required. 100% private. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.

item.name: Day 1 — Surabaya to Taman Safari Prigen and Bromo Overnight
item.description: 09:00 pick-up from Surabaya hotel. Transfer to Prigen Safari Park (~90 min). Safari adventure 10:30–13:00. Lunch at Safari area restaurant (own expense). 15:00 overland transfer to Bromo area (~120 min). Check-in at Joglo Kecombrang Bromo. Breakfast included.

item.name: Day 2 — Bromo Sunrise and Caldera Exploration
item.description: 01:00–02:00 departure for Penanjakan viewpoint by 4WD jeep. Milky Way window pre-dawn. Sunrise at Penanjakan (~05:30, 2770 m). Sea of Sand jeep traverse to caldera floor. Crater approach on foot. Return to hotel for breakfast. Second overnight at Joglo Kecombrang Bromo.

item.name: Day 3 — Madakaripura Waterfall and Return to Surabaya
item.description: Breakfast and check-out. Transfer to Madakaripura (~50 min). Canyon trek ~1.5 km through narrow gorge to the horseshoe waterfall curtain (guests will get wet — raincoat required). Return overland to Surabaya (~4–5 hours). Drop-off at Surabaya hotel or airport.

subjectOf.name: Taman Safari Prigen
subjectOf.description: Drive-through and walk-through wildlife safari park in Prigen, Pasuruan, East Java. Hundreds of animal species in naturalistic habitats. Day-visit format with on-site restaurant.

subjectOf.name: Mount Bromo
subjectOf.description: Active stratovolcano at 2,329 m in the Tengger caldera. Penanjakan sunrise viewpoint (2,770 m) and sea-of-sand caldera floor traversed by private 4WD jeep.

subjectOf.name: Madakaripura Waterfall
subjectOf.description: Java's tallest waterfall in a narrow canyon gorge in Probolinggo. Horseshoe curtain waterfall (~100 m main drop). Easy 1.5 km canyon trek from roadside parking.

offers.description: Per-person price by group size: IDR 4,350,000 (2 pax) · IDR 4,150,000 (3) · IDR 3,950,000 (4–5) · IDR 3,750,000 (6–7) · IDR 3,550,000 (8–10) · IDR 3,450,000 (11+). Minimum 2 guests. All-inclusive: private transport, dedicated crew, 2 nights accommodation + breakfast, Taman Safari Prigen entrance fee, private 4WD jeep (Bromo), mineral water, T-shirt. No health screening required. Lunch at Safari area is own expense.

mainEntity.name: What is included in the 3 Day Taman Safari Prigen, Bromo & Madakaripura price?

acceptedAnswer.text: All JVTO packages include: private transport (AC MPV for 1–3 guests, Toyota Hiace for 4–9), dedicated crew, all entrance fees and permits, mineral water daily, pick-up to drop-off assistance, and a JVTO travel T-shirt. This tour additionally includes Taman Safari Prigen entrance fee, 2 nights accommodation with breakfast (Joglo Kecombrang Bromo, nights 1 and 2), and a private 4WD jeep for Mount Bromo. Lunch at the Safari area restaurant is own expense. No Ijen health screening on this tour. International flights, travel insurance, and personal expenses are not included. Minimum 2 guests.

mainEntity.name: Is this tour suitable for families with children?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. This is one of JVTO's most family-friendly multi-day circuits. There is no night hike and no health screening requirement. Taman Safari Prigen is appropriate for all ages. Mount Bromo sunrise is reached by 4WD jeep — no significant hiking required for the viewpoint. Madakaripura involves a 1.5 km canyon walk on wet terrain; guests will get wet from waterfall spray, which children typically enjoy. Discuss group ages and fitness levels at the booking inquiry stage.

mainEntity.name: What happens if Mount Bromo is closed on my tour dates?

acceptedAnswer.text: JVTO provides a written Plan B briefed before departure, not improvised at the gate. If Mount Bromo closes due to volcanic activity or a park authority order, an alternative route is offered. Guests may rebook at no penalty if the primary site is inaccessible on the booked dates due to official closure. JVTO monitors PVMBG and BBKSDA advisories daily and contacts guests proactively if closures are imminent.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to prepare anything specific for the Madakaripura Waterfall segment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Bring a raincoat or waterproof bag and a change of clothes — the canyon approach involves wading through a stream and walking under falling water. You will get wet. Sandals or water-resistant shoes are recommended over regular trainers. The canyon walk is approximately 1.5 km and takes 20–30 minutes each way on wet, uneven terrain. JVTO guides brief guests before entry. No prior trekking experience is required.

mainEntity.name: Is this a private tour or a shared group tour?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100% private. Your booking covers your own vehicle, your own dedicated crew, and your own itinerary for all 3 days. No strangers are added to your tour at any point. JVTO does not operate shared group tours.
